calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2018 Off Calendar

Affidavit Of Andy Zanoff In Support Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-01-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Fernando Gonzalez, an individual.Fernando Gonzalez, an individual
Dept. 514. Judge: Eric R. Fleming. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Debra D. Lew, Esq. appeared for plaintiff City and County of San Francisco, a municipal corporation.
Jeannette Bryant, Senior Collections Officer for the City & County of San Francisco's Office of the Treasurer/Tax Collector, and Joanna Constantino, Patient Account Supervisor at San Francisco General Hospital, both witnesses for plaintiff, were placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Fernando Gonzalez, an individual.
Plaintiff's complaint to recover costs of medical aid rendered, and for breach of contract, was filed on November 28, 2017 and served on December 7, 2017.
Default was entered against defendant on January 12, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on January 12, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff City and County of San Francisco, a municipal corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Fernando Gonzalez, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $58,352.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,327.52.

Total - $60,679.52.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Affidavit Of Andy Zanoff In Support Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-27-2018 Continued To Nov-01-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
